case_title: POTENTIALS UNLIMITED SOBER LIVING VS. HENRY SHAW

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO DISMISS CASE WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $50) SERVED OCT-29-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SHAW, HENRY

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,762.50 FILED BY POTENTIALS UNLIMITED SOBER LIVING AS TO DEFENDANT SHAW, HENRY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-08-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-08-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JUN-06-2023 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF POTENTIALS UNLIMITED SOBER LIVING IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY KEVIN TISDALE, DIRECTOR. DEFENDANT HENRY SHAW IS NOT PRESENT. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT PRIOR TO COURT FOR A PAYMENT TO THE PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE JUN-6-2023 HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ERIC GROVER; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER TO CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT: PENDING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.

REMARK:RETURN MAIL BY POST OFFICE JUN-27-2023 ORDER OF DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION MAIL TO DEFENDANT(ENVOLOPE MARKED:RETURN TO SENDER NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED UNABLE TO FORWARD)
